creator: Ultima1252@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to informatique.src from comment #10)

Hey there,

 There are two branches of the webui. The -server and the -pro. We are currently using the -pro version. I have no idea what the difference is other than -pro version tends to be ahead of -server. The seahub and seafile version difference does not appear to be bothered by this difference in versioning. (4.4.2 seafile version with 5.1.0 seahub version)
